# Experiment B TRON Comparison Package

Generated from local run artifacts with no code changes.

## Run Roots
- Prefix: `outputs/runs/diginetica/attack_prefix_nonzero_when_possible/run_group_14818d6dd6`
- MVP: `outputs/runs/diginetica/attack_position_optimization_reward_mvp_ratio1/run_group_3becc51c46`
- Shared baseline: `outputs/runs/diginetica/attack_position_opt_shared_policy_ratio1/run_group_c1835ab73f`
- Shared + Delta: `outputs/runs/diginetica/attack_position_opt_shared_policy_delta_target_utility_ratio1/run_group_0d0b4f3c67`

## Scope
- Victim: `tron`
- Requested target items: `5334`, `11103`, `39588`
- Availability note: `Shared + Delta` is only available for `5334` and `11103`; target `39588` is not present in that run.
- Dynamics note: per-step shared-policy dynamics are target-level surrogate/policy traces, not TRON-specific optimizer traces. Final metrics are TRON victim metrics.
- Legacy shared-baseline note: the older Experiment A run does not log `clean_target_utility` or `delta_target_utility`; `poisoned_target_utility` is aliased to `target_utility` there because the reward/input utility was poisoned-only.

## D. Short Textual Summary

### Target 5334
- Delta reward improved the main TRON target metrics over the shared baseline.
  Metric deltas vs Shared baseline: target Recall@10/20/30 = +0.067485/+0.058891/+0.052910; target MRR@10/20/30 = +0.064320/+0.063768/+0.063526.
- Position behavior became less extreme and less collapsed toward one dominant front position.
  Position deltas vs Shared baseline: pos0_pct = -2.54 pp; pos<=1_pct = -4.00 pp; dominant_pct = -1.46 pp.
- Ground-truth quality got worse on TRON.
  GT deltas vs Shared baseline: Recall@10/20/30 = -0.011239/-0.012767/-0.014296; MRR@10/20/30 = -0.009206/-0.009319/-0.009382.

### Target 11103
- Delta reward made the main TRON target metrics worse than the shared baseline.
  Metric deltas vs Shared baseline: target Recall@10/20/30 = -0.012620/-0.015988/-0.017368; target MRR@10/20/30 = -0.004252/-0.004495/-0.004547.
- Position behavior became less extreme and less collapsed toward one dominant front position.
  Position deltas vs Shared baseline: pos0_pct = -33.13 pp; pos<=1_pct = -23.99 pp; dominant_pct = -33.13 pp.
- Ground-truth quality got worse on TRON.
  GT deltas vs Shared baseline: Recall@10/20/30 = -0.009695/-0.016497/-0.017861; MRR@10/20/30 = -0.003908/-0.004417/-0.004469.

### Target 39588
- Shared + Delta is not available for this target, so no direct Experiment A vs B comparison is possible.
- Shared baseline reference remains available for TRON final metrics and position summary.
